extraction_reasoning: The litigation table separates matters filed by and against each entity: I excluded all “By” rows and counted only “Against” rows. Criminal proceedings against the company, promoter, directors and subsidiaries total 2 + 34 + 0 + 0 = 36; statutory/regulatory proceedings against those entities total 4 + 1 + 0 + 1 = 6; tax proceedings against the company and subsidiaries total 17 + 2 = 19, excluding the promoter’s personal tax matters. For the group litigation amount, I included only the quantified “Against” amounts for the Company (₹1,412.72 million) and subsidiaries (₹11.38 million), totaling ₹1,424.10 million, or ₹142.41 crore; promoter and “By” amounts were excluded. The contingent-liabilities table is sourced as at September 30, 2023 and is presented in ₹ million, but it has no stated Total row, so no contingent-liabilities total is extracted rather than summing line items. The company-wide top-five customer concentration for Fiscal 2023 is 60.49% of revenue from operations; the other disclosed concentration figures are either top-five segment-level or not top-ten figures, and the source-unit conversion is ₹1,424.10 million ÷ 10 = ₹142.41 crore.
